description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, the Jeanie One Band sandal from rockport makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it works great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Soft leather midfoot strap with brand logo embossed on top Pull loop on the strap for easy on/off Ergonomically padded suede footbed for exemplary comfort Outsole TPU outsole with brand logo styled grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the mildly raised heel for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to clean the footbed Do not store in direct sunlight
